content: --color-accent (blue) is reserved for interactive/selected only (links, hover, primary button, active segment, tree selection). Magnitude bars use a separate --color-bar (violet), unified across Summary's two charts and Element Detail. Green/rose stay semantic (added/removed in diffs). Muted text was lifted (#a6aec0 dark / #4f5560 light) for AA. Shared .tbl and PathLabel (dim prefix, bold leaf) standardise tables and path display.

name: CodeMirror find-all + VS Code minimap match highlights
description: EditorTab uses a custom StateField (matchField) driven by a setQuery StateEffect to own the match list (count/nav/highlight) instead of the search panel. The minimap (@replit/codemirror-minimap) match ticks come from showMinimap.compute([matchField], state => gutters) which auto-recomputes from the field — gutters: [{lineNo: color}] paint matched lines like VS Code's overview ruler. Theme + xmlHighlight bound to --color-* CSS vars for light/dark.
Reconfiguring the minimap via a Compartment dispatch inside EditorView.updateListener risks CodeMirror reentrancy ('no dispatch during update') and an extra render cycle.
resolution: Derive view config from a StateField with Facet.compute(deps, fn) instead of dispatching from updateListener; the listener only sets React state (count/cursor), never view.dispatch.

title: Large-file editor perf gates: defer reparse >2MB, drop minimap/wrap >3MB
rationale: 20MB files froze the editor. Three fixes: (1) auto pretty-print minified input on open so CodeMirror can virtualise many short lines instead of one giant line; (2) above LIVE_REPARSE_MAX (~2MB) setEditedRaw no longer runs full analyse() per edit — analysis defers to setTab/setActive navigation; (3) above HEAVY_VIEW_MAX (~3MB) drop the @replit minimap (draws the whole doc) and lineWrapping. Tree-node clicks while in the editor drive the matchField search ('<tag') to highlight occurrences + minimap ticks instead of jumping to Element Detail.
